capabilities_used.evidence: 反复直接使用 4 年周期框架：2024-09-17“The 4-Year Cycle. #Bitcoin”，2024-06-24 同题，2025-08-01 同题；配图中的 Spiral/4-Year Cycle 把 2010/14/18/22/26 与 2009/13/17/21/25 放在固定象限上，明显是在做周期位置映射。

ETF 流量是他最核心的需求代理之一：2024-01-26“Proud to present the live #Bitcoin ETF Tracker.”；2024-02-27“massive day with +9.5k #BTC added to holdings. That is 10x the issuance”；2024-10-22“Last week's ETF inflows were a record 9x the new supply issuance.”；2025-04-28“Last week’s net ETF inflows were over 11x the new supply issuance, a new record!”。
他明显把全球流动性/M2 作为 BTC 的上游驱动：2025-04-14“Global liquidity at an ATH, rising steeply. #Bitcoin”；附图 8 直接把 Bitcoin 与“Combined M2 Money Supply / Global Liquidity YoY”并列，强调全球流动性同比变化。

他多次用估值带和 MVRV 解释周期位置：2024-05-25“The current situation best mimics the rallies of the 2nd Halving, both in price and MVRV score.”；2024-05-28“On-chain value map: heavy overvalued now at $130k and rising.”；2024-01-31 也发“On-chain value map”，说明他在用链上估值区间判断冷热。
他会把关键均线/成本线收回当成趋势切换确认：2024-10-23“Reclaimed key levels: STH cost basis, 21-week, and 200-day moving averages. #Bitcoin”。这里明确把 200 日均线和 21 周均线收复视作看多确认。

他的语境经常是识别牛市扩张阶段而非做双向交易：2025-05-21“Uncharted territory. 🚀 #Bitcoin”、2025-07-11“Lift-off from the $2 trillion market cap.”、2025-01-25“Short-Term Holder Supply continues its uptrend, signaling a bull market continuation”。
虽然他更常用广义流动性而非单独国债收益率，但框架上明显属于“流动性改善利多 BTC”。附图 8 的叙事核心就是央行资产负债表与货币供给扩张推动风险资产；2025-04-14 直接把 rising liquidity 当作看多证据。
在给出的高赞样本里，他并不高频交易 FOMC 本身，说明事件周并不是主框架；更多是宏观流动性和 ETF 慢变量，因此该能力只是弱相关背景项。

他经常讨论供给被长期吸走而不是短线抛压：2024-10-30“This means buying up all of the new supply issuance for the remainder of this Halving at current prices.”；2024-05-29“BlackRock flipped Grayscale in #BTC Holdings.”。这更偏供给锁定/强手吸收逻辑。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: STH Cost Basis Framework
new_capabilities_proposed.name_zh: 短期持币者成本线框架
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Uses the Short-Term Holder cost basis and its deviations as dynamic support/resistance, bull-market reset marker, and trend continuation filter.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 以短期持币者成本线及其偏离度作为动态支撑/阻力、牛市重置与趋势延续判断框架。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2024-06-18“STH cost basis at $63.8k.”；2024-10-23“Reclaimed key levels: STH cost basis, 21-week, and 200-day moving averages.”；2025-09-05“Bouncing off the STH cost basis at ~$109K.”

new_capabilities_proposed.name: ETF Flow vs New Issuance Supply Squeeze
new_capabilities_proposed.name_zh: ETF 净流入对新发行供给挤压
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Measures whether spot ETF net inflows are absorbing a multiple of newly mined BTC supply; high multiples imply structural demand pressure and bullish squeeze conditions.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 衡量现货 ETF 净流入是否吸收了数倍于新增挖矿发行的 BTC 供给；倍数越高，越说明结构性买盘与供给挤压越强。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2024-02-27“That is 10x the issuance”；2024-10-22“record 9x the new supply issuance”；2025-04-28“over 11x the new supply issuance, a new record!”

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Spiral Quadrant Cycle Map
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Maps Bitcoin price progression across repeated 4-year spirals/quadrants to identify where the market sits relative to prior cycle ATHs, bottoms, and halving points.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 将比特币价格路径映射到重复的 4 年螺旋/象限中，用于识别当前相对历史周期顶部、底部与减半点的位置。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 附图 1、2、5 都是他标志性的 Spiral / 4-Year Cycle 图；2024-12-05“Crossed the 100k ring! 🚀”说明他连整数价位都用同心圆/环带来表达周期推进。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Cycle Bottom Normalized Comparison
new_capabilities_proposed.name_zh: 从周期底部归一化比较
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Normalizes each BTC cycle by days since bottom and compares the current path against prior cycles to estimate whether the market is lagging, in line, or outperforming.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 按“距离周期底部的天数”归一化每一轮 BTC 周期，并与历史周期对比，判断当前是落后、对齐还是跑赢。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2024-09-22“Recovery since cycle bottom.”；2024-08-27“Outperforming previous cycles.”；2024-12-21“Right in between the previous two cycles.”；附图 7 标题即“Bitcoin Cycles: comparison from cycle bottom”。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Quarterly Seasonality Bias
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Uses recurring quarter-based seasonality, especially Q3 softness and Q4 optimism, as a contextual bias overlay for BTC trend expectations.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 使用季度季节性，尤其是 Q3 偏弱、Q4 乐观，作为 BTC 趋势预期的上下文偏置层。

personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 即使偏多，也强调情绪节制，不把牛市判断表达成失控追涨。

personal_quirks.quote: Right in between the previous two cycles. #Bitcoin
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 所有当前价格行为都先放回历史周期分布里定位，而不是孤立解读单一波动。
他把市场状态切成季度/阶段标签，用叙事化命名来传达周期位置。
常用反讽处理回撤，默认把中期牛市内的大跌视为周期内常态，而不是结构破坏。
他会直接拿市场流行反叙事做对照，强化自己对长期周期框架的坚持。

unique_traits: 他不是传统那种靠形态、趋势线和日内 trigger 的 TA 交易员，而是把 BTC 当成一个由减半、ETF 吸筹、链上成本线和全球流动性共同驱动的“周期资产”来研究。图表表达极强，擅长把复杂框架压缩成 Spiral、Halving Progress、Cycle Bottom Comparison 这类一眼可传播的视觉模型。整体上更像长期仓位管理型的 BTC 周期分析师，而不是高频做多空切换的执行派交易员。

high_conviction_phrases: Global liquidity at an ATH, rising steeply.
This means buying up all of the new supply issuance for the remainder of this Halving at current prices.
Lift-off from the $2 trillion market cap.
low_conviction_phrases: Anyone feeling optimistic about crossing the 100k ring yet?
Will #Bitcoin be below or above $100k in the next couple of months?
Right in between the previous two cycles.
